name: GitHub
description: Read repos, search code, manage issues and PRs, monitor Actions runs

credentials.label: Personal Access Token
credentials.hint: github.com → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic)

name: Firebase
description: Connect one or more Firebase projects — Firestore read/write, auth, hosting deploy, 30+ tools

instanceCredential.label: Service Account JSON
instanceCredential.hint: Firebase Console → Project Settings → Service accounts → Generate new private key → download the JSON and save it somewhere permanent, then select it here.

name: Brevo
description: Transactional email, SMS, contacts, campaigns, templates, analytics

credentials.label: Brevo API Key
credentials.hint: Brevo dashboard → Settings → API Keys → Generate a new API key

name: Obsidian
description: Read, write, search, and edit notes, tags, and frontmatter in your vault

credentials.label: Local REST API Key
credentials.hint: In Obsidian → Settings → Local REST API → copy the API key shown there

credentials.label: Protocol
credentials.hint: Use 'http' if your Local REST API plugin runs without SSL (most common for local setups). Use 'https' if you enabled SSL in the plugin settings.

credentials.label: Port
credentials.hint: Default is 27124. Only change if you configured a different port in the Local REST API plugin.

prerequisiteWarning: Obsidian must be running and the Local REST API community plugin must be installed and active.

name: Google Drive
description: List, read, and search files across your Google Drive using your Google account

name: You.com Search
description: Web search, full page content extraction, and deep research with citations — free tier works without an API key

credentials.label: API Key (optional — free tier works without one)
credentials.hint: you.com/platform → Get an API key for higher rate limits. Free tier: 100 searches/day, no key needed.
